message:
feat(abi): add C23 IEEE 754-2019 math functions and glibc internal ABI stubs

Add 441 lines of new math ABI functions implementing the C23 IEEE 754-2019
fmaximum/fminimum family (fmaximum, fminimum, fmaximum_num, fminimum_num,
fmaximum_mag, fminimum_mag) with all width variants (f, l, f32, f32x, f64,
f64x, f128). These implement strict NaN and signed-zero semantics per the
IEEE 754-2019 specification.

Also adds 142 lines of glibc internal ABI stubs, 66 new symbol exports in
libc.map version script, and 584 new entries in the support matrix tracking
symbol coverage across libc implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
